## What does this PR do?

## Checklist
- [ ] Device class created, registered in `DeviceRegistry`, added to `DeviceAdapter`
- [ ] Tests added per [testing-methodology.md](app/src/test/java/org/cagnulein/qzcompanionnordictracktreadmill/testing-methodology.md)
- [ ] `displayName()` follows the naming convention in [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md#device-naming-convention)
- [ ] Comments explain *why*, not *what*
- [ ] `version.properties` bumped (patch for bug fixes, minor for new devices)
